component.name: Outlook Tasks
component.summary: Manage outlook.com tasks from the COSMIC panel

description.p: A COSMIC panel applet to view, create, edit, complete, and delete Microsoft To Do tasks on a personal outlook.com account via the Microsoft Graph API.

ul.li: View pending tasks sorted by due date, with overdue tasks highlighted.
Create, edit, and delete tasks with due dates, recurrence, importance, and reminders.
Complete tasks directly from the panel popup.
Sign in with Microsoft using OAuth 2.0 (PKCE); tokens are kept in the system keyring.

screenshot.caption: Pending tasks in the panel popup, sorted by due date with overdue tasks highlighted
Creating a task with a due date, recurrence, importance, and a reminder

description.p: Initial release: view, create, edit, complete, and delete tasks.
